name: compute_distance_matrix
description: Calculate travel distance and duration between multiple origins and destinations. Returns a matrix of distances and travel times for each origin-destination pair, useful for logistics and route planning.

parameters.name: origins
parameters.description: One or more origin addresses or coordinates, pipe-separated.

parameters.name: destinations
parameters.description: One or more destination addresses or coordinates, pipe-separated.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Travel mode. One of: driving, walking, bicycling, transit.

parameters.name: departure_time
parameters.description: Departure time as Unix timestamp or 'now' for traffic-based estimates.

parameters.name: avoid
parameters.description: Features to avoid, pipe-separated. Options: tolls, highways, ferries.

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Unit system. One of: metric, imperial.
